title: Rolling CVaR Dashboard Metric and Per-Account Risk Budget
summary: Compute a rolling 30-day CVaR (Conditional Value at Risk, also called Expected Shortfall) for each account's position portfolio and display it on the per-account dashboard. CVaR tells users not just 'your worst 5% of days will be at least -X%' (VaR) but 'when you are in that worst 5%, you should expect to lose -Y%' — a meaningfully more informative metric for tail risk. Research consistently shows CVaR is a coherent risk measure that CVaR minimisation also minimises VaR, making it strictly superior for risk-budget display.
deferral_reason: Future analytics — deferred during paper_trading_single_account prioritisation
